meta_title: For Founders: testing automation to Solve no portfolio (Intermediate Resource Page)
meta_description: Learn how to testing automation and overcome no portfolio. A Intermediate-level Resource Page using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Founders: Test Automation to Solve No Portfolio
content.seo_description: Learn how to use testing automation to overcome a lack of portfolio. An intermediate guide for Founders using Antigravity and Claude Code to ship faster.
content.answer_block: Stop letting a thin portfolio stall your growth. By implementing automated testing, you demonstrate professional-grade reliability and architectural maturity to stakeholders. Use Antigravity for rapid test generation and Claude Code to execute these suites, effectively transforming your MVP into a production-ready asset that proves your technical competence and business viability.
content.intro:
The cold reality of SaaS is that stakeholders don't buy code; they buy risk mitigation. When your portfolio is empty, you are not just selling a product—you are selling a promise. Without a track record, your biggest obstacle isn't the feature set; it is the perceived fragility of your architecture. 

Testing automation is the bridge between a 'hobbyist' MVP and a scalable enterprise solution. By embedding comprehensive test suites into your build pipeline, you turn a 'no portfolio' liability into a competitive advantage. You are demonstrating that your product won't break at scale, allowing you to close enterprise deals faster and earn the trust that your competitors are still struggling to build.

steps.title: Define Your Critical Path
steps.description: Identify the 3 core user journeys that generate revenue. We will focus testing here to maximize business impact.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze my current codebase and identify the 3 most critical business flows that require unit testing to ensure revenue-generating functionality remains stable.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'identify critical paths and output as a markdown checklist'

steps.title: Automate Unit Test Scaffold
steps.description: Use Antigravity to generate high-coverage test shells for your core modules, ensuring 80%+ coverage.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a comprehensive suite of unit tests for the identified critical paths using Vitest. Ensure edge cases are handled.
steps.claude_code_command: claude write 'generate unit tests for critical modules in /src/services'

steps.title: Implement Integration Hooks
steps.description: Bridge the gap between your frontend and backend with automated integration tests that mimic real user sessions.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create playwright integration tests that simulate a full user checkout flow, including database state validation.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'setup integration testing suite with playwright for the auth and checkout flows'

steps.title: Establish CI/CD Validation
steps.description: Integrate Claude Code into your repository to enforce that no code can be merged without passing the test suite.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a GitHub Actions workflow that triggers the test suite on every pull request.
steps.claude_code_command: claude write 'create .github/workflows/test-pipeline.yml to enforce tests on PR'

steps.title: Portfolio Showcase Documentation
steps.description: Document your testing strategy to show potential clients that your product is built to withstand high-volume demand.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Draft a README section titled 'Engineering Excellence' that summarizes our testing coverage and reliability standards.
steps.claude_code_command: claude write 'generate a documentation block for the README explaining our testing strategy and coverage stats'

pro_tips: Treat your test suite as a product feature; update it alongside your roadmap to keep your 'Engineering Excellence' docs fresh.
Use mock data that mirrors production database schemas to ensure your tests catch real-world integration bottlenecks.
Prioritize 'negative testing'—ensure your app fails gracefully during API outages; stakeholders trust robust error handling over perfect uptime.
Automate your test reporting; sending an automated daily health report to your Slack channel builds massive confidence with non-technical stakeholders.
When pitching, show the 'test pass' terminal log during demos; it is a visual psychological trigger that signals professional reliability.
resources: Testing Best Practices for SaaS: https://martinfowler.com/testing/
content.next_steps: Integrate these automated tests into your production deployment pipeline to ensure your MVP remains stable as you iterate toward your first 100 paying customers.
content.conversion_block: Don't let a lack of history stop you from building the future. By automating your quality assurance, you signal to the market that you are a serious founder building a serious product. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
